channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Inside Canada’s ‘troubling’ shift on migrant, refugee rights
item.description: Experts say Canada 'closing the doors' as socioeconomic issues upend decades-long consensus on immigration.

item.title: Taiwan accuses Kenya of deporting conference delegates on China’s behalf
item.description: First African nation to host the global oceans conference defends deportations, saying it 'recognises only one China'.

item.title: Pro-Palestine solidarity on display at the 2026 World Cup
item.description: Fans from Algeria to Bosnia are making sure the Palestinian cause gets attention during the World Cup.

item.title: Israel takes control of Hebron’s Ibrahimi Mosque: What this means
item.description: Palestinians controlled planning and construction in the entire West Bank city under the 1997 Hebron Agreement.

item.title: Zidane Iqbal: The footballer who gave Pakistan its first World Cup moment
item.description: Manchester-born midfielder Zidane Iqbal becomes the first player of Pakistani heritage to feature at a World Cup.

item.title: Floyd Mayweather faces theft charges for using bad cheque to buy a watch
item.description: Boxing legend allegedly wrote the cheque on New Year's Eve 2024 and could face up to 20 years in jail if found guilty.

item.title: Why UK’s Makerfield by-election matters far beyond one parliamentary seat
item.description: Thursday's contest could pave the way for Manchester Mayor Andy Burnham to challenge Keir Starmer's premiership.

item.title: UK’s Starmer says Russian warship’s warning shots in Channel ‘reckless’
item.description: Russia says shots were fired to divert a yacht outside the UK's territorial waters.

item.title: Inside the ‘unacceptable’ UK fair selling property in Israeli settlements
item.description: There was no mention of Palestinians at the 'Great Israeli Real Estate Event', say activists who accessed the fair.

item.title: World Cup predictions: Portugal vs DR Congo, England vs Croatia and more
item.description: Ronaldo chases goal-scoring record, as Portugal and England begin their World Cup campaigns.

item.title: Vietnam police rescue more than 400 cats from animal theft crime ring
item.description: Animal welfare groups say the bust highlights the 'enormous scale' of the country's cat meat trade.

item.title: Iranian tankers exit US blockade zone before talks to end war
item.description: As US, Iran prepare to sign MoU and start more talks, TankerTrackers monitor says Iran exports first oil in two months.

item.title: G7 leaders to boost Ukraine air defences, tighten sanctions on Russia
item.description: A statement from the G7 summit in France says leaders are united in their 'unwavering support for Ukraine'.

item.title: US primaries in Oklahoma, Georgia, others: Key takeaways from the results
item.description: Trump-backed candidates fall short in primary results in the US ahead of crucial midterms in November.

item.title: Dramatic rescue after plane crashes onto Texas highway
item.description: Dramatic rescue after plane crashes onto Texas highway.

item.title: Oil prices continue slide amid hopes for peace, opening of Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Brent crude drops to lowest price since early March, before signing of framework deal to end US-Israel war on Iran.

item.title: Georgia Republican primary delivers mixed results for Trump
item.description: US president has been at the centre of this year's midterm campaigns in a test of his influence.

item.title: Iran war day 110: Tehran says Israeli attacks on Lebanon threaten US deal
item.description: Iran warns of a 'harsh response' as Lebanon attacks test the US deal and strain Trump-Netanyahu ties.

item.title: Arnautovic scores penalty as Austria beat World Cup debutants Jordan 3-1
item.description: Austria were given a scare by debutants Jordan before securing a win, rounded off by a penalty in stoppage time.

item.title: England vs Croatia: World Cup – Kane, match prediction and how to watch
item.description: Title contenders England begin their FIFA World Cup campaign against familiar foes Croatia in Group L in Dallas.

item.title: Analysts predict no US petrol price drop until 2027
item.description: US drivers may have to wait until 2027 for gasoline prices to fall

item.title: Satellite images show 10 places where water is disappearing globally
item.description: From lakes to rivers, freshwater is declining worldwide under rising climate and land pressure.

item.title: How past ‘terrorist’ movements are often judged right by history
item.description: Who decides which movements are remembered as terrorists and which are celebrated as agents of change?

item.title: UN chief blames global indifference for Haiti crisis
item.description: UN Secretary-General Antonio Guterres says the international community has failed Haiti as gang violence deepens

item.title: Vozinha’s mum celebrates hero keeper son from afar
item.description: The mother of Cape Verde’s celebrated goalkeeper Vozinha says she watched his heroics on the TV.
